phrases.en: Mia opens the ride-share app on her phone.
phrases.zh: 米娅打开手机上的网约车应用。

phrases.en: She types in where she wants to go.
The app shows her the price for the ride.
phrases.zh: 应用显示出这趟车的价格。

phrases.en: She taps the button to request a car.
A nearby driver accepts her request.
phrases.zh: 附近的一位司机接了她的单。

phrases.en: She watches the car move toward her on the map.
phrases.zh: 她看着车在地图上朝她驶来。

phrases.en: The driver pulls up to the curb.
She checks the license plate to make sure it is the right car.
phrases.zh: 她核对车牌，确认是这辆车。

phrases.en: She gets in the back seat and buckles her seat belt.
phrases.zh: 她坐进后座，系好安全带。

phrases.en: The driver takes her to her address.
phrases.zh: 司机把她送到她的地址。

phrases.en: She gets out of the car.
The app charges her card automatically.
phrases.zh: 应用自动从她的卡里扣款。

phrases.en: Then, she gives the driver five stars.
phrases.zh: 然后，她给司机打了五星。
